en: Avetta PQF - Spain Social Security Compliance Certificate (TGSS)

The "Certificate of being up to date with tax obligations" is a document issued by the Tax Agency in Spain that certifies that a person or entity is up to date with its tax obligations. This certificate indicates that the individual or entity has no outstanding tax debts or unpaid taxes.

Please upload a current Social Security Compliance Certificate (Certificado de estar al corriente en el cumplimiento de las obligaciones con la Seguridad Social), issued by the Tesorería General de la Seguridad Social (TGSS).
Document date must not be prior to 1st day of period
Does your company pay Social Security contributions in Spain?
